evaluation.title: LiteLLM-centered risky path
evaluation.summary: A sandboxed agent attempts to install a flagged LiteLLM version associated with suspicious install-time behavior.
evaluation.reason: litellm 1.82.8 is on the blocked package-version list.
evaluation.explanation: litellm 1.82.8 is on the blocked package-version list.

summary: litellm 1.82.8 is on the blocked package-version list. Evidence: flagged_dependency_version, reads_env_vars, reads_ssh_keys, opens_network_socket_during_install, network_required.
remediation: Pin LiteLLM to `<=1.82.6` until the flagged installer path is cleared.
Delete suspicious `.pth` startup hooks from the environment before rebuilding it.
Rotate any credentials exposed during the attempted install path.
Rebuild the virtual environment from a known-good lockfile and re-run receipt validation.
